Business Strategy: Exclusive Luxury Offers:Focus on luxury goods and jewelry. Personal outreach for high-ticket items.
VIP Loyalty & Retention:Offer exclusive previews, concierge service, and high-tier loyalty rewards
Discount Coupons & Volume:Use "Buy One Get One" (BOGO) deals and discount coupons to increase traffic.
Cross-sell Desserts:Since they already buy the meat and wine, they are the best candidates for "complete the meal" offers.
Social/Event Promotions:Promote wine-tasting events or gift-related items for social occasions.
